en_title: Kadokawa Should Be Making More Money From Elden Ring, Activist Investor Says as CEO Survives Shareholder Vote
cn_title: 投资者称角川应从《艾尔登法环》赚更多，CEO涉险过关
subtitle: 钱没到位
opus_summary: 角川CEO夏野刚在股东投票中保住职位，但大股东Oasis仍施压，指其未从《艾尔登法环》赚足利润，要求收回全球发行权。Oasis强调From Software应成为角川增长核心，宫崎英高则安抚称工作室创作自由未受影响。

paragraphs.en: The boss of Japanese company Kadokawa has survived a shareholder vote on his future amid increasing pressure from an activist investor who believes the company has failed to capitalize on Elden Ring’s enormous success.
paragraphs.cn: 日本角川的社长在一场关乎自身去留的股东投票中涉险过关，他正面临来自激进投资者的持续施压。该投资者认为角川未能充分利用《艾尔登法环》的巨大成功攫取更多利润。

paragraphs.en: reported on the result of a showdown between Kadokawa CEO Takeshi Natsuno and Hong Kong-based Oasis Management, which is now the company’s largest shareholder with a 13.76% stake, during a meeting of shareholders. While Natsuno has survived for now, reported that Oasis has just upped its stake to 15.25%, with plans to increase it further.
paragraphs.cn: 在股东大会上，角川CEO夏野刚与总部位于香港的Oasis Management之间的对决结果已见分晓，后者目前是公司第一大股东，持股13.76%。夏野刚暂时过关，但有报道称Oasis刚刚将持股比例提升至15.25%，并计划进一步增持。

paragraphs.en: Elden Ring is from legendary video game developer FromSoftware, which is owned by Kadokawa. It has sold an astonishing 30 million copies — a figure that is sure to rise with the release of Tarnished Edition in August. Elden Ring launched in 2022, and since then has released expansion Shadow of the Erdtree (2024) and multiplayer spinoff, Elden Ring Nightreign (2025), but Oasis wants more financial return from the franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 《艾尔登法环》出自传奇游戏开发商From Software，后者为角川旗下工作室。该作已卖出惊人的3000万份，随着8月《褪色者版》的发售，这一数字无疑还会上升。《艾尔登法环》于2022年发售，此后陆续推出了扩展内容《黄金树幽影》（2024年）和多人衍生作《艾尔登法环 黑夜君临》（2025年），但Oasis希望这个系列带来更多经济回报。

paragraphs.en: Part of Oasis’ complaint about Kadokawa and indeed Elden Ring is that it does not publish the game itself globally. While FromSoftware self-publishes Elden Ring in Japan, Bandai Namco publishes the game internationally, reducing profit. Oasis wants Kadokawa to self-publish its games everywhere.
paragraphs.cn: Oasis对角川、尤其是对《艾尔登法环》的部分不满在于，角川并未在全球自行发行该作。From Software在日本自主发行《艾尔登法环》，但在海外市场由万代南梦宫发行，这降低了利润。Oasis希望角川能在全球范围内自营发行旗下游戏。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, amounted to just a 10% stake and little has come of it.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，另一事件仅涉及10%的持股且收效甚微。

paragraphs.en: “FromSoftware is Kadokawa’s crown-jewel asset: a globally recognized studio with a loyal international fanbase and a proven ability to create blockbuster titles such as Elden Ring,” Oasis has said. “Yet Kadokawa continues to leave a meaningful share of the economics from these titles with third-party publishing partners, creating a significant and ongoing loss of value for all of Kadokawa’s stakeholders.”
paragraphs.cn: Oasis表示：「From Software是角川的明珠资产：一家享誉全球的工作室，拥有忠诚的国际粉丝群，具备打造《艾尔登法环》这类大作的能力。但角川却持续将这些作品带来的可观经济收益拱手让给第三方发行伙伴，给全体利益相关方造成了长期且重大的价值损失。」

paragraphs.en: Oasis has insisted it isn’t trying to force a sale of FromSoftware (there have been all sorts of rumors about various video game companies buying it over the years). Oasis instead believes FromSoftware should be the "central driver" of Kadokawa’s long-term growth.
paragraphs.cn: Oasis坚称自己并非要逼迫角川出售From Software（多年来一直有各路游戏公司欲收购其的传闻）。Oasis认为，From Software反而应该成为角川长期增长的「核心驱动力」。

paragraphs.en: “Our point is that FromSoftware must be managed with the ambition, investment, and strategic focus that an asset of its quality deserves,” Oasis said. “Its employees, creators, and fans deserve ownership and leadership that are fully committed to helping the studio realize its extraordinary global potential.”
paragraphs.cn: Oasis称：「我们的立场是，From Software理应得到与其优质资产相匹配的雄心、投入和战略聚焦。它的员工、创作者和粉丝，也理应获得全心全意帮助工作室实现非凡全球潜力的经营者和领导层。」

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, celebrated FromSoftware director and architect of its hit games, Hidetaka Miyazaki, commented on the shareholder pressure Kadokawa is under . Reassuring fans, he insisted that FromSoftware can still “freely make the kind of games we want to make without excessive interference."
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，From Software著名总监、多款热作缔造者宫崎英高就角川面临的股东压力发表了看法。他为粉丝送上定心丸，坚称From Software依然能「自由地制作我们想做的游戏，不受过分干预」。

paragraphs.en: FromSoftware has Elden Ring Tarnished Edition as well as new action title The Duskbloods to look forward to later this year. But fans are wondering what's next from the developer. Could Elden Ring 2 be on the cards? In December 2024, Miyazaki said the developer was not considering making Elden Ring 2 , but wouldn't shut down the possibility in the future. If not, there is an Elden Ring movie in the works.
paragraphs.cn: From Software将在今年晚些时候迎来《艾尔登法环 褪色者版》和全新动作游戏《The Duskbloods》。但粉丝们更关心开发商的下一步动向。《艾尔登法环2》有戏吗？2024年12月，宫崎英高曾表示团队并未考虑制作《艾尔登法环2》，但也未完全否定未来可能。如果新作暂缺，那至少还有一部《艾尔登法环》电影正在筹备中。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上关注他 @wyp100，或通过电子邮件wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系他，保密通讯可发至wyp100@proton.me。
